{{Infobox location
| name = Zenith Chamber
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] Chamber is a spiritual entity associated with the ancient [[Zenith Devices]]. It possesses a gentle and maternal personality, interacting with others in a manner similar to a parent reuniting with long-lost children. The Chamber is capable of providing blessings to individuals and appears to work in tandem with the [[Zenith Devices]] to further their shared objective of fostering the growth of galactic civilization.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The spirit within the glass is believed to be the spirit of the [[Zenith Chamber]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Felrex]] is blessed by the [[Zenith Chamber]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Chamber]] is the one who asked if they had called to surrender.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Chamber]] is working with [[Vault]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Chamber]] is a character that asks for a prize.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|"You must be the spirit of the Zenith Chamber,"<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Have you called to surrender?” the Zenith Chamber said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“in a manner of speaking, you and I are already working together.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"And what is my prize?" the Zenith Chamber asked gently.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
